title: Meet Me After the Show
writer: Richard Sale, Mary Loos, Erna Lazarus
actors: Betty Grable, Macdonald Carey, Rory Calhoun
plot: Delilah Lee is the star of husband Jeff Ames' Broadway show when she starts to suspect he has been exchanging more than contracts with the show's vampish backer. Alimony and amnesia become the order of the day.
